definition: Failed breakout / liquidity sweep where price breaks a significant level then immediately reverses back. A specific pattern of liquidity_sweep.
depends_on: market_structure (the swing high/low that defines the level)
feeds_into: trade entry — turtle soup itself IS an entry signal when confirmed
related_to: liquidity_sweep (turtle soup IS a type of sweep)
judas_swing (a judas swing can manifest AS a turtle soup pattern)
buy_pattern: Price breaks below significant low (takes SSL), closes back above → the low was a trap.
sell_pattern: Price breaks above significant high (takes BSL), closes back below → the high was a trap.
confirmation: Reversal candle must CLOSE back inside prior range. Wick-through + close-back = turtle soup. Close-beyond = real breakout.
